finding_results.notes: Eli's Reno commitment now lands only after an incoming deadline text and explicit loss statements for both EAST NOW and RENO TONIGHT options.
Both flagged abstract beats were replaced with embodied action/sensation and immediate stake-linked thought specific to Eli's pressure state.
The rehab memory now includes recalled dialogue and a concrete behavioral interruption (aborted call, physical reset) before Eli resumes logistics with altered, accountable wording.

The pivot and sacrifice are now on-page earlier: Eli physically quarantines wire money before planning, commits to Reno under deadline pressure, and immediately refuses paid rest due to cash consequences.

summary: Implemented all required structural/craft fixes: tightened transcript drift, moved pivot pressure earlier, made route causality deadline-driven, and replaced abstract impact language with embodied consequence while preserving continuity and voice constraints.
